hooks.text: Everyone saw the market today — but this is the part they missed.
Indian markets just got hit by something bigger than the headline.
Auto moving is not the real story today. Here's what is.
Here's why auto moved today, in 30 seconds.
Nifty Auto: approx -2% (worst major sector) — and it came down to one thing.
You think the index tells the story. Today it didn't.
Why did auto really move today?
